items.label: Assessment
items.value: The exploratory step titled 'Validate persona scenario #2' requires a deterministic outcome regarding the audit trail of support actions. However, the evidence provided does not include specific checks or validations that confirm the existence or functionality of the audit trail feature. As such, it is unclear whether the expected result can be achieved, leading to an inconclusive status.
